utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: How you doing ? Welcome . Good to see you !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: That is great . But uh , I am not really expecting a lot of calls .

utterances.text: No you answer it and take pledges .

utterances.text: You do not seem to understand . See , I was Dr . Drake Remoray .

utterances.text: Well , here is your phone doctor .
